questions.q: What type of machines is the Canadian federal government planning to ban to stop scammers, according to an April 2026 announcement? [1.4]
As of late April 2026, Canada's Health Minister Majorie Michel was 'looking into' legislation that would permanently ban the sale of tobacco products to anyone born after which year?
In Winnipeg, a 17-year-old teen was charged with animal cruelty in April 2026 after allegedly driving an SUV over multiple sleeping what?
Prime Minister Mark Carney's newly minted majority government launched a new skilled training strategy in its 2026 spring economic update, projecting a 2026-27 deficit of what amount?
In April 2026, auto insurers Beneva and L'Unique filed a $72-million lawsuit over stolen vehicles targeting Honda, Toyota, and which other automaker?
